quality_assessment.main_issue: The video has narration and a single animated image, but lacks real video flow, section visuals, b-roll, motion graphics, and animations.

what_worked: End-to-end pipeline successfully produced an upload-ready package.
Video assembly produced a valid MP4.
Video QA approved the technical file.
Manual unlisted YouTube upload was completed.
what_failed: Video is too static for public release.
Visual layer does not yet feel like a real documentary video.
There are no section-based visuals, b-roll scenes, charts, maps, or explanatory animations.
Voice quality is acceptable for testing but should become more fluid and conversational later.
required_next_systems: Video Assembly v1 with section-based visuals
